user_prompt: Customer is writing in all caps and threatening to leave a one-star review. Draft a calm, respectful response that acknowledges their frustration.
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Customer Success - Escalation / Churn Risk

Draft response:

Hi [Customer Name],

I hear you, and I am so sorry for the frustration this has caused. It is completely understandable that you are upset, and I want to do everything I can to make this right for you. 

Your experience is really important to us, and it's clear we've let you down here. 

So that I can fix this immediately, could you please share a few more details about exactly what went wrong? As soon as I have that information, I will personally look into your account and find a solution. 

I am here to help get this sorted out as quickly as possible. 

Best regards,

Compass
Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the priority and category of the user's request and provided a calm, empathetic draft response as requested.
